roa.docketEntryComment: DEFT ATC REQUEST TO RECALL A BENCH WARRANT FILED

/CAL: DISMISSAL/X: AS PART OF A NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION, THE PEOPLE MOVE TODISMISS THIS CASE PURSUANT TO PC 1385,/MO GRTD/X:THE DEFENDANT ENTERS A HARVEY WAIVER, /X:ANY RESTITUTION OR OTHER MATTERS RESULTING FROM DISMISSEDCHARGES MAY BEADDED AS TERMS AND CONDITIONS OF THE SENTENCE IN COURT NO,21005127,/

/CAL: TO SET/X: AS PART OF A NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION, THE DEFENDANT ENTERSA HARVEY WAIVER, /X:ANY RESTITUTION OR OTHER MATTERS MAY BE ADDED AS TERMSAND CONDITIONS OFTHE SENTENCE IN COURT NO, 21005127,/CONTD: DISMISSAL/DOP

/X: MINUTES AMENDED 02-25-22,/CAL: BENCH WARRANT RETURN FOR 02-17-22 FAILURE TO APPEAR AND RETURN ON 02-07-22 SHERIFF'S AFFIDAVIT WARRANT FOR NON COMPLIANCE/NP/OC/X: THE BENCH WARRANT AND SHERIFF'S AFFIDAVIT WARRANT WERE RECALLED ON 02-23-22 AND DEFENDANT WAS REMANDED INTO SHERIFF'S CUSTODY, BAILWAS SET AT $75000,/X: THE HEARING DATE OF 03-03-22 IS CONFIRMED,/
/CAL: BENCH WARRANT RECALL & PENDING SHERIFF'S AFFIDAVIT WARRANT/BWR: 02-17-22/BWR1/X: SHERIFF'S AFFIDAVIT WARRANT IS RECALLED/SHER/X: BAIL REMAINSAS PREVIOUSLY SET/CONTD: TO SET/DOP/

/CAL: TO SET & ACM ELIGIBILITY REPORT/STWPX/ACM/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'SOFFICE,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSO/CTORD:DEFENDANT SHALL BE RELEASED AFTER A COORDINATED PICK-UP WITH SFSO COMMUNITYPROGRAMS IS IN PLACE,/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/CTORD: DEFENDANT TO REPORT TO PRETRIAL DIVERSION 5 TIMES PER WEEK FOR SUPERVISION & TO PROVIDE PROOF OF ENGAGEMENT WITH HOSPITALITY HOUSE EMPLOYMENT RESOURCE CENTER/CONT/DOP/
/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/NTW/LDPX:01-13-22/BAIL:40000/CONTD: IRC RETURN/DOP/
/CAL: TO SET & ACM ELIGIBILITY REPORT/NP/FTA/ACMRVKD/BWI/BAIL:75000/BWNUM:1ST/X: 4 OF 4 BENCH WARRANTS ISSUED THIS DATE/NIGHTSERV/
/CAL: PRELIMINARY HEARING & ACM ELIGIBILITY REPORT/X: THE PEOPLE ARE READYTO PROCEED TODAY,/STWPX/CONTD: TO SET & ACM ELIGIBILITY REPORT/
/CAL: IN-CUSTODY REFERRAL RETURN/DAWT/X: FUTURE COURT DATE OF 01-11-22 ISCONFIRMED/CONTD: ACM ELIGIBILITY REPORT & PRELIMINARY HEARING/
